title: Refine Hero tagline text color and font style

requirements.summary: Update Hero section tagline to use a bold serif font and warm golden-amber color for a premium, refined appearance
acceptanceCriteria: The Hero tagline uses a refined, bold serif font (e.g., Fraunces at a heavier weight or a more prominent variant).
The tagline color is updated to a warm golden-amber tone that is noticeably richer or more saturated than the previous version.
The tagline remains clearly legible against the hero background image and gradient overlays.
No other text elements outside the tagline are unintentionally affected.

file_operations.description: Update the Hero tagline element styling to apply a bold serif font (e.g., font-fraunces with font-bold or font-extrabold) and change the text color to a warm, rich golden-amber shade (e.g., using a custom Tailwind color class or inline style with an OKLCH/hex value like #d4a574 or oklch(75% 0.12 75)). Ensure the tagline selector targets only the tagline text and does not affect other Hero text elements.
